arts.ttl: ‘My favourite player’: Thierry Henry says Arsenal have a player he prefers to Martin Odegaard
arts.sum: Arsenal have so many talented players on their books right now. Martin Odegaard is a world-class player, while William Saliba is arguably the world’s best...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim 'believes Man United job is more complicated than he first thought' with honeymoon period well and truly over for new Red Devils boss following back-to-back defeats by Arsenal and Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Any momentum in the sails of his arrival has been buffeted by back-to-back defeats by Arsenal and Nottingham Forest - only the second time this has happened in his career.

arts.ttl: 'He told me': Player admits to friend that signing £150,000-a-week Arsenal contract was a 'serious mistake'
Three Arsenal youngsters tipped to be better than Bukayo Saka revealed by Thierry Henry
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is one of the world's standout wingers and a shining success for Arsenal's academy - but Thierry Henry has revealed the England international was not always the talk of north London

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal can FINALLY land Arteta's favourite striker in January
arts.sum: Talk of a January bid by Arsenal for Dusan Vlahovic is heating up - and there is a good chance that Juventus would consider selling the Serbian striker in the right conditions. And should Arsenal make a bid in January, Juventus would definitely consider selling.

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s Dan Ashworth decision sees red flag raised after Man Utd ‘embarrassment'
arts.sum: Martin Keown has warned Arsenal to remember how quickly Dan Ashworth left Newcastle United to join Manchester United. Crucially, in terms of how Ashworth's past could be viewed by players at Arsenal and those who the club want to sign, Keown added: "The sporting directors, they're role models within the building.

arts.ttl: Monaco boss says Arsenal 'impossible' to stop one in area, hails 'superb' Gunners man
Special Arsenal VRCT 2024 Lifestyle Collection Released
arts.sum: Adidas and Arsenal have just launched the 2024 VRCT varsity lifestyle collection with a unique design.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta teases January reinforcements for Arsenal amid injury crisis
arts.sum: Arsenal could look to bring in fresh talent in January after an injury-stricken start to the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal considering move for Dan Ashworth after Man United exit
arts.sum: Arsenal are considering a move to bring Dan Ashworth in as the club’s new sporting director, following his shock exit at Manchester United. A mutual decision was made for Ashworth to leave his role at Manchester United this week, just five months after his appointment at Old Trafford.
